title: Verify Pause Trial flow and state update
description: Test the complete pause trial flow including popup confirmation and widget state update
preconditions: User is in Trial Corner Manage section

steps.description: 1. Navigate to Trial Corner > Manage Trial
3. Observe popup with 'Remind later' and 'Pause' options

expected_result: Popup appears, on confirmation trial status changes to 'Paused', homepage widget and Trial Corner update to paused design, all content sections become locked, pause-clicked event fires
